notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package primarily describes visible events: two eight-turned elders appearing to stabilize injuries, Gu Yue Fang Zheng using the Demon Suppression Board to heal, the human path ten children treating Zhao Lianyun and others, and Shen Shang and Lu Weiyin attacking the Divine Emperor City. These are all publicly observable events during a battle aftermath. No private knowledge, secret motives/plans, future-known information, or directly supported knowledge gaps are present in the seed. The entities' descriptions (e.g., 'Heavenly Court Gu Immortal') are metadata, not hidden facts. No source-backed hidden/private fact candidate can be extracted.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package contains mostly event summaries and entity descriptions about天庭 members in神帝城 after battle. Characters' actions (古月方正 treating others,人道十子 helping) are visible but their motives are not directly stated or clearly inferable from the seed facts. Observed actions like古月方正 using诛魔榜 to treat众仙 could imply desire to help allies, but the seed does not provide enough direct context to make a cautious one-step inference without psychological leap. No clear motive can be confidently extracted from the available source pointers.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

insufficient source-backed seed: The seed primarily describes individual天庭蛊仙 (Heavenly Court Gu Immortals) receiving medical treatment after battle, with古月方正 coordinating人道十子 for healing. No collective faction/group pressure is clearly established. The天庭 (Heavenly Court) is mentioned as a faction in relations but the seed facts focus on individual injuries and recovery, not faction-level pressures. 中洲十大古派 is mentioned as a subordinate faction but has no concrete stake or pressure in the seed events. No named collective actor has a clear, source-backed pressure axis with conservative likely reactions.
IF export filter quarantined 11 legacy old-schema branches.
